b:T3857,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Label a peptide bond in the diagram of a polypeptide.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Outline the primary structure of proteins.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Identify <strong>two</strong> hydrolysis reactions that occur in the small intestine.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>c:T3c94,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: left;"><em>Award <strong>[1]</strong> for any one of the four peptide bonds identified in this markscheme</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">number/sequence/order of amino acids «in a protein/polypeptide chain» ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">a. polysaccharides to disaccharides/monosaccharides<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>starch/glycogen to <span style="text-decoration: underline;">maltose</span> ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">b. sucrose to glucose <em><strong>AND</strong></em> fructose ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">c. maltose to glucose ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">d. lactose to glucose <em><strong>AND</strong></em> galactose ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">e. proteins/peptides/polypeptides to shorter peptides/amino acids<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>dipeptides to amino acids ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">f. triglycerides/lipids/fats/oils to glycerol <em><strong>AND</strong></em> fatty acids ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
